title: Introduction to Microsoft Azure Data analytics in Azure
summary: Introduction to Microsoft Azure Data analytics in Azure

sections.title: Introduction to Microsoft Azure Data analytics in Azure
sections.summary: Introduction to Microsoft Azure Data analytics in Azure

lessons.title: Explore fundamentals of large-scale analytics
lessons.content_md:
Organizations use analytics platforms to build large scale data analytics solutions that generate insights and drive success. Microsoft provides multiple technologies that you can combine to build a large scale data analytics solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/examine-components-of-modern-data-warehouse/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Explore fundamentals of real-time analytics
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the basics of stream processing, and the services in Microsoft Azure that you can use to implement real-time analytics solutions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-fundamentals-stream-processing/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Explore fundamentals of data visualization
lessons.content_md:
Learn the fundamental principles of analytical data modeling and data visualization, using Microsoft Power BI as a platform to explore these principles in action.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-fundamentals-data-visualization/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Introduction to Microsoft Azure Data analytics in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Introduction to Microsoft Azure Data analytics in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
